# Arjun Varadiyil — Portfolio

> Full stack developer in Kerala, India. Builds production Next.js and Payload CMS platforms for editorial teams, news portals, biennale programmes, and civic tech.

## About

- Name: Arjun Varadiyil
- Role: Full stack developer (Next.js, Payload CMS, TypeScript)
- Location: Kerala, India
- Website: https://arjunvaradiyil.in
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arjunvaradiyil
- GitHub: https://github.com/arjunvaradiyil/arjun.varadiyil

## Expertise

- Headless CMS architecture with Payload CMS
- Next.js applications for high-traffic publishing
- Editorial platforms, news portals, and civic tools
- Performance, accessibility, and maintainable production delivery
